title: Rental expenses
description: Check the expenses you can claim as a deduction for your rental property.
keywords: tax deductions, rental property deductions, rental expenses, immediate deductions, rental deductions

child_links.title: How to claim rental expenses
child_links.description: When to apportion and claim rental expenses, what you can’t claim, and how to include deductions in your tax return.

child_links.title: Common property expenses
child_links.description: Check the common rental expenses you can claim a deduction for.

child_links.title: Depreciating assets in rental properties
child_links.description: How to claim a deduction for depreciating assets and work out decline in value.

child_links.title: Repair and maintenance expenses
child_links.description: Find out how and when to claim your repair and maintenance expenses.

child_links.title: Capital expenses
child_links.description: What to do with your capital expenses, including capital works, improvements, and substantial renovations.

child_links.title: Borrowing expenses
child_links.description: Find out which borrowing expenses you can claim, and how to claim them.

child_links.title: Interest expenses
child_links.description: Find out which interest expenses you can claim and what to do if your loan account is used for private purposes.

child_links.title: Rental properties and travel expenses
child_links.description: If you have a residential rental property, you may not be able to claim a deduction for related travel expenses.

child_links.title: Work out the category of your rental upkeep expenses
child_links.description: Use our quick reference guide to categorise and claim rental repairs, maintenance and capital works.

child_links.title: Asbestos-affected properties
child_links.description: If you own an asbestos-affected investment property, check the deductions you can claim. CGT may apply if you sell it.

child_links.title: Apartment building defect expenses
child_links.description: If you own an apartment in a building complex, you may be able to claim deductions for shared expenses to fix defects.

source_description: Check the expenses you can claim as a deduction for your rental property.
